subcodes.first_line: O thou who art imprisoned in the path of God! That which thou hadst written was perused. Thou didst inquire about thy duty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المسجون فی سبیل الله آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید قرائت گردید سئوال از تکلیف
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @suffering and imprisonment
